policy_pages.title: Terms of Service
policy_pages.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of Sparkle Cleaners’ website, pickup and delivery services, and in-store offerings. By placing an order, you agree to provide accurate information, follow pickup and delivery instructions, and pay all applicable fees. Orders are subject to garment inspection; we may refuse service for items that are heavily damaged or unsafe to clean. Liability for damage is limited to the lesser of the garment’s current value or 10 times the cleaning price, as allowed by law. Disputes must be reported within 7 days of delivery. Additional terms may apply to subscriptions and promotions, as described on their respective pages.

policy_pages.title: Privacy Policy
policy_pages.content: Sparkle Cleaners collects information you provide when you create an account, place an order, schedule pickups, or contact support. We use this information only to provide and improve our services, process payments, communicate about your orders, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information. Service providers (such as payment processors and messaging platforms) may process data on our behalf under strict confidentiality terms. You may request access to or deletion of your personal information by contacting us via the Help / FAQ section or the Contact page.

policy_pages.title: Service Policies & Garment Handling
policy_pages.content: Our service policies describe how we handle your garments, including inspection, cleaning methods, and issues such as stains, damage, and missing items. Stain Treatment: We do our best to remove stains using methods appropriate for the fabric, but complete removal is not guaranteed and some stains may be lightened only. Delicate & Specialty Items: Items labeled as delicate or requiring special care may have longer turnaround times or additional fees. Missing or Lost Items: We record item counts at pickup and during processing. If you believe an item is missing from your order, you must notify us within 48 hours of delivery so we can review processing logs, camera footage (where available), and delivery records. Confirmed missing items will be handled according to our Limited Liability policy, typically based on the garment’s age, condition, and proof of value. The full missing-items policy is also summarized in the Help / FAQ section under Orders & Delivery. Turnaround & Delivery: Stated turnaround times (e.g., same-day, next-day, 2-day) are targets and may be affected by holidays or extreme weather, but we will notify you of significant delays whenever possible.

subscription_plans.name: Wash & Fold Monthly – Up to 30 lbs
subscription_plans.description: Monthly subscription for up to 30 lbs of wash & fold laundry with weekly pickups included. Ideal for individuals or couples with regular laundry needs.
subscription_plans.notes: Pickup day and time (e.g., Tuesday evenings after 6 PM) can be customized during checkout.

subscription_plans.description: Light weekly wash & fold service suitable for smaller households or those who do laundry frequently.

subscription_plans.description: Convenient dry cleaning plan for up to 10 items per month, including suits, dresses, and jackets.
subscription_plans.notes: Unused item credits do not roll over to the next month.

help_articles.title: What if an item is missing from my order?
help_articles.content:
If you believe an item is missing from your order, please contact us as soon as possible so we can investigate.

How we track your items:
- Our team records item counts at pickup and at key stages of processing.
- Many locations use in-store cameras and barcode labels to track orders.

What to do if something is missing:
1. Double-check the bags and any hanging items you received.
2. Confirm whether the missing item might have been in a different order or dropped off on a different date.
3. If you still cannot locate the item, contact us within 48 hours of delivery and provide:
   - Your order number
   - A description of the missing item (type, color, brand, size)
   - The pickup and delivery dates

Investigation and resolution:
- We will review processing logs, any available camera footage, and delivery records.
- If we confirm that an item was lost while in our care, we will compensate you according to our Limited Liability policy (see Service Policies) based on the garment’s age, condition, and proof of value where available.

To reach us directly about a missing item, use the “Contact Us About This Issue” button on this page or the Contact form and select the option closest to “Missing Item” or “Order Problem.”

help_articles.title: How do I track the status of my order?
help_articles.content:
You can track your order status in several ways:

Website:
- Sign in and go to the “My Orders” section.
- Each order will show a status such as: Pending Pickup, In Cleaning, Ready for Delivery, Out for Delivery, or Completed.

Email & SMS updates:
- We send automatic updates at pickup, when cleaning is finished, and when your order is out for delivery.

If your order appears stuck in one status for more than 24 hours past the expected turnaround time, please contact our support team and choose an issue type similar to “Order Problem” so we can investigate.

help_articles.title: Delivery times and fees
help_articles.content:
Our delivery options are designed to fit different schedules and budgets. Available options may vary by location and item type.

Typical choices:
- Standard Delivery (3-Day): Budget-friendly option for most orders.
- Standard Plus (2-Day): Faster standard option for laundry and dry cleaning.
- Express (Next-Day): Priority processing with next-day delivery.
- Same-Day Express: Pickup and delivery on the same day, subject to cutoff times.

You’ll see the exact delivery fee for each option at checkout, based on your address and selected services. If you don’t see a particular speed (for example, Same-Day), it may not be available for your location, time window, or items.

help_articles.title: What payment methods do you accept?
help_articles.content:
We accept several payment methods depending on how you place your order:

Online orders:
- Major credit and debit cards
- Some digital wallets (where available)

In-person or on-delivery payments:
- Credit/debit card at the door or in-store
- Cash (at most locations)

If you prefer not to pay online, choose an offline option such as “Pay at Store,” “Pay on Pickup,” or “Pay at Delivery” during checkout when available.

help_articles.title: How are price calculator estimates determined?
help_articles.content:
Our Price Calculator provides an estimate based on the items and quantities you enter.

How it works:
- Each service (e.g., Shirts – Wash & Press, Suits – Dry Clean, Dresses – Dry Clean) has a published per-item price.
- The calculator multiplies the quantity of each item by its current price and adds applicable fees.

Why the final total may differ:
- Actual items counted at pickup may differ from your online estimate.
- Special handling requests or stain treatment add-ons may add to the total.
- Promotions and discounts may reduce the final amount.

You’ll always see an updated order summary for review before confirming your booking.

help_articles.title: What is included in Wash & Fold service?
help_articles.content:
Wash & Fold is our everyday laundry service for most machine-washable items, including shirts, pants, socks, underwear, towels, and linens.

Included:
- Sorting by color and fabric type
- Washing with standard detergent
- Drying on appropriate heat settings
- Neatly folding and bagging items

Not included by default:
- Ironing/pressing
- Stain treatment beyond our standard pre-spotting

You can add stain-treatment extras or request Ironing Only services if you need pressed garments.

help_articles.title: Dry cleaning vs. Wash & Fold: which should I choose?
help_articles.content:
Use Wash & Fold for everyday, machine-washable clothing and linens. Choose Dry Cleaning for delicate fabrics, structured garments (such as suits and wool coats), and items labeled “Dry Clean Only.”

Examples:
- Wash & Fold: T-shirts, jeans, casual pants, socks, towels, bedding.
- Dry Cleaning: Suits, dresses, wool coats, blazers, silk items.

If you’re unsure, you can leave a note in the Special Instructions area. Our team will inspect the care labels and may move items to the appropriate service to prevent damage.

help_articles.title: How does stain treatment work?
help_articles.content:
Stain treatment is available as an add-on for most orders.

What we do:
- Inspect the stained area and identify likely stain type.
- Apply appropriate stain removers that are safe for the fabric.
- Re-clean the garment as needed.

Important limitations:
- Some stains (e.g., set-in, dye, or bleach stains) may not come out completely.
- Aggressive treatment may risk color loss or fabric damage; in those cases we will be conservative.

You can choose specific stain-related add-ons (such as general stain treatment, spot cleaning, or collar stain removal) during checkout if you want us to focus on particular problem areas.

help_articles.title: Store locations and hours
help_articles.content:
You can view all of our locations and their hours on the Locations page.

From the homepage:
1. Click “Locations” in the main navigation.
2. Enter your ZIP code (for example, 94105).
3. Filter by distance and sort by proximity.

Each store detail page lists weekday and weekend opening and closing times, along with phone number, address, and an option to set that store as your preferred location.

help_articles.title: How do subscriptions work?
help_articles.content:
Subscriptions are recurring plans that bundle services like Wash & Fold for a discounted monthly or weekly rate.

Key points:
- You choose a plan (for example, a monthly Wash & Fold plan up to a certain weight).
- During signup you select pickup frequency (weekly, biweekly, etc.), preferred day (such as Tuesday), and time window (such as evenings after 6 PM).
- Billing recurs automatically according to the plan’s billing period.

You can manage or cancel your subscription from your account or by contacting support before the next billing date.

service_addons.name: Stain Treatment (General)
service_addons.description: Targeted stain removal for one garment or small group of garments, using fabric-appropriate solutions.

service_addons.name: Spot Cleaning

service_addons.description: Gentle stain treatment for silk, wool, and other delicate fabrics.

service_addons.name: Button Replacement
service_addons.description: Replace missing or broken buttons with a close match in size and color.

service_addons.name: Minor Hem Repair
service_addons.description: Quick repair for loose or fallen hems on pants, skirts, and dresses.

service_addons.name: Odor Removal Treatment
service_addons.description: Specialized treatment to help remove persistent odors such as smoke or mildew.

service_items.name: Wash & Fold (By the Pound)
service_items.description: Everyday laundry washed, dried, and neatly folded, priced per pound.
service_items.notes: Weight is rounded to the nearest pound. Included in certain subscription plans.

service_items.description: Machine-washable shirts washed, dried, and folded.
service_items.notes: Does not include pressing; choose Ironing Only for pressed shirts.

service_items.name: Wash & Fold – Pants
service_items.description: Casual pants and jeans washed, dried, and folded.
service_items.notes: Not intended for suit trousers; choose Dry Cleaning for dress pants.

service_items.description: Bath and kitchen towels washed with hot water and dried thoroughly.
service_items.notes: Large blankets and comforters are priced separately.

service_items.name: Shirts (Wash & Press)
service_items.description: Shirts professionally washed and pressed on hangers.
service_items.notes: Same-day service available at select locations for morning pickups.

service_items.name: Suits (Dry Clean)
service_items.description: Two-piece suits dry cleaned and pressed.
service_items.notes: Same-day express available with morning pickup and express speed selected.

service_items.name: Dresses (Dry Clean)

service_items.notes: Heavily embellished or formal gowns may be priced separately.

service_items.description: Delicate dry cleaning for formal and evening dresses with additional inspection.

service_items.name: Wool Coat – Dry Clean
service_items.description: Standard dry cleaning for wool and wool-blend coats.
service_items.notes: Best choice for most wool coats requiring cleaning within 2–3 days.

service_items.name: Wool Coat – Delicate Care
service_items.description: Premium delicate-care cleaning for high-end or particularly delicate wool coats.
service_items.notes: Includes extended inspection and hand finishing. Turnaround is typically 3 days.

service_items.name: Jacket – Dry Clean
service_items.description: Dry cleaning for blazers, sports coats, and light jackets.
service_items.notes: Down or heavily insulated jackets may incur an additional fee.

service_items.name: Ironing Only – Per Item
service_items.notes: Include special instructions such as ‘No creases on trousers’ in the notes field.

service_items.name: Ironing Only – Shirts
service_items.description: Ironing and light pressing for laundered shirts.
service_items.notes: Perfect for customers who wash at home but prefer professional pressing.

service_items.name: Boxed Shirt Finish
service_items.description: Dress shirts returned folded in a protective box instead of on hangers.
service_items.notes: Can be added to qualifying shirt cleaning or ironing services.

service_items.name: Luxury Fold & Packaging
service_items.description: Enhanced folding and packaging for garments, ideal for travel or gifting.
service_items.notes: Applies to the entire order rather than individual items.
